plan_review_notes: Proceed with the first concrete MCP follow-up discovered during inspection: fix the request_task MCP response schema so Sisyphus can be used reliably as the control plane.

plan_review_history.notes: Proceed with the first concrete MCP follow-up discovered during inspection: fix the request_task MCP response schema so Sisyphus can be used reliably as the control plane.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to repairing the MCP request_task schema/response contract and adding regression coverage.

normal_cases.name: `sisyphus.request_task` exposes an integer `orchestrated` field through the MCP tool definition.

edge_cases.name: A `request_task` call that returns `orchestrated=0` still validates and is preserved as an integer.

exception_cases.name: MCP regressions outside the request path remain green after the schema change.

verification_methods.target: sisyphus.request_task exposes an integer orchestrated field through the MCP tool definition.
A request_task call that returns orchestrated=0 still validates and is preserved as an integer.
MCP regressions outside the request path remain green after the schema change.
verification_methods.method: ./.venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_mcp_core tests.test_mcp_server tests.test_event_bus tests.test_taskflow.TaskflowDaemonTests tests.test_taskflow.TaskflowNewTests -v
